name: xtension
description: Browser extension to improve the X/Twitter experience with practical tools.

scripts.build:full: npm run build:assets && npm run build
scripts.check: node --check src/content.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/options.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/locales.js && node --check scripts/codex-reply-bridge.js && node --check scripts/benchmark-reply-ai.js
scripts.bridge:service:build: dotnet publish bridge-service/Xtension.Bridge.Service.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=false -o dist/bridge-service
scripts.bridge:release: npm run bridge:build && npm run bridge:service:build && npm run bridge:sign && npm run bridge:installer:build && npm run bridge:installer:sign
